title: physostegia virginiana var. granulosa
intro: Physostegia virginiana var. granulosa, commonly known as 'Ozark Beauty', is a variety of the tubular-flowing snakeroot plant, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as sore throats, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Physostegia virginiana var. granulosa include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
